description: Drop-in system_instructions JSON snippet for SWE-1.6 output-verification discipline. Adds 5-stage quality pipeline (structure-check, cite-check, recommendation-actionability, citation-accuracy, anti-hallucination) with confidence scoring formula adapted from smallcode's verification pipeline (verifier.ms:252-260).

Confidence-scoring rubric formula adapted from smallcode: 0.35×structure-check + 0.25×cite-check + 0.25×recommendation-actionability + 0.10×citation-accuracy − 0.05×anti-hallucination-failures. Maps smallcode terms (compile/execute/tests/lint/auto_fixed) to research output quality dimensions. Includes threshold guidance (0.80+ ship, 0.70-0.79 warning, <0.70 hard-fail).

Integration handshake for post-dispatch-validate.ts: create sibling validator function validateIterationQuality (separate from validateIterationOutputs) to handle content-quality validation (citations, actionability, anti-hallucination) while validateIterationOutputs handles structural correctness (file existence, JSONL shape). Includes TypeScript function signature with ResearchVerificationResult interface and computeResearchConfidence function.

Hard-fail message template for refused delivery when validateIterationQuality returns confidence below threshold. Adapts smallcode's formatHardFail function (hard_fail.ms:29-70) to research output context with actionable remediation guidance per failure stage, retry/decompose strategy, and smallcode provenance reference.
